subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Rest thou assured in the bounty of the Lord God, and rejoice in the bestowals of the All-Merciful, for the cord of attachment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله مطمئن بفضل حضرت یزدان باش و مسرور بموهبت حضرت رحمان که رشته تعلق
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
